scripts.build: npm run -w @erp/api-gateway build && npm run -w @erp/ingestion-worker build && npm run -w @erp/web build
scripts.lint: npm run -w @erp/api-gateway lint && npm run -w @erp/ingestion-worker typecheck
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @erp/api-gateway typecheck && npm run -w @erp/ingestion-worker typecheck
